# LLMCosts.dev — Openrouter Models Pricing
> Source: LLMCosts.dev — https://llmcosts.dev
> Updated: 2026-04-09
> Route cheaper via OpenRouter: https://openrouter.ai/?ref=llmcosts
(Part 1)

| Model | Provider | Input/1M | Output/1M | Cached/1M | Context | ELO | Tier | Type |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|---------|---------|-----|------|------|
| [Free Models Router](https://llmcosts.dev/models/free) | Openrouter | $0.0 | $0.0 | $None | 200,000 | 1200 | standard | Closed |
| [Body Builder (beta)](https://llmcosts.dev/models/bodybuilder) | Openrouter | $-1000000.0 | $-1000000.0 | $None | 128,000 | 1200 | standard | Closed |
